text.title: Work Breakdown Structure Decision Tree
text.summary: Tree mapping observable signals (node name shape, weight sum, leaf hours, depth balance, overhead presence, prior-id collision) to a concrete action with rule reference.

conclusion.verdict: reject node; re-prompt for noun phrase

branch.question: all six overhead branches present at level 1?

conclusion.verdict: add missing overhead branch(es) before proceeding to decompose product branches
identify the missing/duplicate scope; decompose again until sum reaches 100
split leaves > 80h; merge leaves < 8h; never consolidate to fit a target count
refuse renumbering; pick the next available id; preserve append-only invariant
emit Dictionary entry for every leaf with included/excluded scope + AC + owner + 8-80 hours + dependencies

text.example: "User Management Module" → noun → all 6 overhead present → L1 weights sum 100 → L2 leaves 8-80 → no id collisions → Dictionary required for 3.2 (Search Functionality).
